articles.author: Gerrit De Vynck
articles.title: Apple sues OpenAI, alleging the AI company stole trade secrets - The Washington Post
articles.description: The blockbuster allegations set up a major legal battle between two tech heavyweights.
articles.content: SAN FRANCISCO Tech giant Apple sued ChatGPT-maker OpenAI on Friday, alleging the artificial intelligence company stole its trade secrets as part of efforts to build out a competing hardware business.
